title: gayophytum racemosum var. typicum
intro: Gayophytum racemosum var. typicum, also known as the spreading bedstraw, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gayophytum racemosum var. typicum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used topically in the form of a salve or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
